text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "cmd.exe was spawned by powershell.exe to execute a VBScript named 'autoupdate.vbs' from the C:\\windows\\system32 directory. This is highly unusual for legitimate system updates and is a common tactic for malware to masquerade as benign activity.",
  "indicators": [
    "powershell_parent",
    "cmd_execution",
    "vbs_script",
    "system32_unusual_file",
    "autoupdate_mimicry"
  ]
}
